description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the viraweb/mblowfish-angularjs-builder:1.0.0 Docker image and caches the node_modules directory, with two stages named build and deploy. In the build stage add a grunt_build job that runs the exact commands: npm install, bower install --allow-root --no-interactive, chmod 777 -fR ., su builder -c "grunt", and find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; it archives ./${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.zip and ./doc as artifacts, records coverage using the provided regex, and is limited to the master and develop branches. In the deploy stage add a marketplace_deploy job that runs npm install, bower install --allow-root --no-interactive, chmod 777 -fR ., su builder -c "grunt build", and then uploads the generated zip via curl -F "file=@./${CI_PROJECT_NAME}.zip" http://marketplace.viraweb123.ir/api/v2/marketplace/spas/token-$MARKETPLACE_TOKEN; this job runs only on the master branch.
